title: Oil exports through the Strait of Hormuz might not return to levels seen before the Iran war
summary_full: Iran's blockade of the Strait of Hormuz has seriously challenged freedom of navigation in the sea lane, raising questions about the future.
summary_public: Iran's blockade of the Strait of Hormuz has seriously challenged freedom of navigation in the sea lane, raising questions about the future.
